text: Being here stirs a curious blend of anticipation and displacement in me. The glass walls and clean lines of the room echo order, yet the slant of my view and the clinical, sterile atmosphere make me feel like an outsider peering in. Moving into the next space, the bold colors and textual reflections on research and uncertainty resonate deeply. I find myself both intellectually stimulated and a little adrift, suspended between intrigue and the transient anonymity of a constructed environment. There is a sense of waiting here—of minds gathering, systems evolving, yet the outcomes remain unknown. I am attentive, contemplative, and quietly uncertain.
